function.name: create_battleship_game
function.description: Creates a complete two-player Battleship web game (10x10 grid, drag-and-drop placement, touch support for mobile) in the specified directory. Generates three files: index.html, style.css, game.js. The game can be opened directly in any modern browser or served with a local HTTP server.

output_dir.description: Absolute or relative path to the directory where the game files should be written. The directory will be created if it does not exist. Example: '/home/user/my-game' or './battleship-output'.
